milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.2 — Swipe-to-reveal delete for draft tiles. Frees up the trailing action slot: drafts no longer render an inline trash icon; instead a red Delete button lives absolutely-positioned behind the tile in a new .dash-tile-swipe-wrap clipping container. iOS Mail pattern: right-to-left swipe past 40px threshold translates the tile to translateX(-80px), revealing the action; tap the red commits delete; auto-closes after 4s of inactivity; tap-outside closes. Honors design-review Rule 10 (destructive actions reveal on right-to-left / trailing side). Does not interfere with grab-handle drag (touchstart bails when target is inside .dash-tile-grab or a data-learn-action button). Direction-lock at 10px vertical / 8px horizontal so vertical scroll stays responsive. Reduced-motion carve-out: tile translate transition disabled but swipe still functional. Wrapper only emitted for drafts; non-draft Learn tiles render bare as before.
